feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: The Breaking Point of Atmospheric Inference—Lessons from K2-18 b
entry.content:
Authors: L Welbanks, M Nixon, P McGill, S Mukherjee - American Astronomical Society ..., 2026

Abstract: ... The sub - Neptune K2-18 b has become a watershed moment for exoplanet atmospheric science. Despite an unprecedented JWST dataset ... K2-18 b reminds us that progress in exoplanet characterization and the search for life will depend as ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

entry.title: Science and Simulations for space-based far-infrared double Fourier interferometry

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: L Spencer, C Benson, M Bonato, C Bracken... - ... Society Meeting Abstracts, 2026

Abstract: ... Topics include: the origin of the universe, the requisite conditions for star and planet formation, and, ultimately, the conditions for the emergence of life . Over half of the energy emitted by the Universe appears in the relatively unexplored Far-IR ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Metabolomic profiling of sweet potato snacks enriched with agave fructans: Effects of vacuum impregnation on in vitro gut-associated metabolites

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: FM Murillo-Nungaray, AC Durán-Castañeda... - Food Research International, 2026

Abstract: White-fleshed sweet potato 'blanco cubano' is an underutilized crop with promising nutritional and functional properties. Enhancement through vacuum impregnation (VI) with agave fructans may improve its prebiotic potential and influence gut microbiota ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Who created god

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: KK Verma

Abstract: ... Abstract: This paper presents a speculative philosophical– cosmological hypothesis regarding the origin of the universe, the emergence of life , the historical formation of the concept of God, and the possible continuity of life across planetary ...

entry.title: PLGA-based nanoencapsulation of prebiotics in food supplements to unlock their full potential for gut health

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: B Fayed - Discover Food, 2026

Abstract: ... This review provides an updated overview of recent advances in prebiotic PLGA nanoencapsulation. These systems improve prebiotic ... This review highlights nanoencapsulation as a transformative approach for developing next-generation ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Toward a systems view of life's origins: Modeling the emergence of complexity across chemical, informational and ecological levels

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: C Alejandre, M Fernández-Ruz, R Guantes, J Aguirre - Current Opinion in Systems ..., 2026

Abstract: Understanding how life emerged from non-living matter remains one of the most profound challenges in science. Empirical constraints and the scarcity of ancient evidence make this question particularly suitable for theoretical and computational ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Sugarcane bagasse derived bacterial nanocellulose as a sustainable multifunctional Pickering stabilizer with prebiotic , antihypertensive, and antidiabetic activities for ...

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: DM Rodrigues, AGSA Rissato, MF da Silva... - Bioresource Technology ..., 2026

Abstract: This study explores the sustainable production of bacterial nanocellulose (BNC) from sugarcane bagasse and its application as a natural Pickering stabilizer with functional potential for the food industry. BNC membranes were synthesized by ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology
